mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_knowledge (id, project_id, parent_id, name, content, doc_type, source_type, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{id}, #{projectId}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{content}, #{docType}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.delete: UPDATE ai_knowledge SET status = 'deleted', update_time = UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id as projectId, parent_id as parentId, name, content, doc_type as docType, source_type as sourceType, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser FROM ai_knowledge WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted'

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, parent_id as parentId, name, content, doc_type as docType, source_type as sourceType, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser FROM ai_knowledge WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, project_id as projectId, parent_id as parentId, name, content, doc_type as docType, source_type as sourceType, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser FROM ai_knowledge WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND status != 'deleted' ORDER BY create_time DESC
